summary: Completed testing of vendor invoice profile learning fix for Tumalo Creek (TUMALOC). All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Login with admin/admin works, dashboard loads with BC CONNECTED status. The fix correctly learns from bc_reference_cache when BC API fails, sets po_expected=False for vendors with 0% PO rate, and skips PO validation for such vendors.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing bc_reference_cache with 18,731 TUMALOC entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor profile learning fix fully tested. Key verifications: (1) _learn_from_reference_cache returns correct stats for TUMALOC (count=18731, po_rate=0.0, avg_amount=$1685.66), (2) build_vendor_profile sets po_expected=False when po_rate < 10%, (3) GET /api/ap-review/vendor-profile/TUMALOC returns po_expected=False, (4) check_ap_ready_to_post skips PO check when vendor_profile.po_expected=False, (5) attempt_ap_auto_post loads vendor profile before calling check_ap_ready_to_post, (6) bc_validation_service filters BOL and invoice numbers from PO candidates.

check_ap_ready_to_post enforces PO check when no profile provided - PASS
attempt_ap_auto_post imports and uses vendor_invoice_profile_service - PASS
bc_validation_service filters out BOL numbers from PO candidates - PASS
bc_validation_service filters out invoice numbers from PO candidates - PASS
bc_validation_service logs PO candidate exclusions - PASS
_learn_from_reference_cache function exists with correct structure - PASS

code_verification.vendor_invoice_profile_service_lines_161: VERIFIED - _learn_from_reference_cache aggregates bc_reference_cache for count, po_rate, amount_stats
code_verification.vendor_invoice_profile_service_lines_300: VERIFIED - build_vendor_profile uses cache fallback and sets po_expected based on po_rate < 0.1
code_verification.ap_auto_post_service_lines_24_85: VERIFIED - check_ap_ready_to_post accepts vendor_profile param and skips PO check when po_expected=False
code_verification.ap_auto_post_service_lines_95_105: VERIFIED - attempt_ap_auto_post loads vendor profile via get_or_build_profile before calling check_ap_ready_to_post
code_verification.bc_validation_service_lines_565_600: VERIFIED - PO candidate filtering excludes BOL numbers and invoice numbers with logging
code_verification.ap_review_py_lines_725_739: VERIFIED - vendor-profile endpoint returns po_expected field

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Tumalo Creek freight invoices were failing PO validation because BOL numbers and invoice numbers were being treated as PO candidates, then failing PO validation. BC reference cache shows bc_order_number is ALWAYS empty for TUMALOC (0 out of 18,731 invoices have PO).
fix_applied: vendor_invoice_profile_service now learns from bc_reference_cache when BC API fails
Profiles include po_expected flag based on historical PO rate (< 10% = po_expected=False)
ap_auto_post_service uses vendor profile to skip PO requirement for vendors where PO is never expected
bc_validation_service filters out BOL and invoice numbers from PO candidates
verification_details: TUMALOC has 18,731 entries in bc_reference_cache with 0 having bc_order_number set
po_expected correctly set to False for TUMALOC
check_ap_ready_to_post returns ready=True even when PO is extracted but not matched (for vendors with po_expected=False)
BOL and invoice numbers are excluded from PO candidate list before validation

mocked_apis.note: BC API calls fail in preview env (invalid tenant) but bc_reference_cache in MongoDB has real data from BC sync. The fix correctly uses cache as fallback.
